title: Multi-tier eggless cakes for weddings and engagements in Parramatta.
summary:
Every cake at Num Nums is 100% eggless. That's not a policy for special orders — it's the starting point for everything, including multi-tier wedding and engagement cakes.

For families in Parramatta, Granville, and Merrylands where a fully vegetarian cake isn't a request but a requirement, that distinction matters.

Custom designs from your photo reference. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache finish. Six sizes; multi-tier cakes are quoted separately. Order by WhatsApp on +61 425 697 725 — we also speak Hindi and Gujarati.

Wigram Street, Harris Park. Open daily until 10pm.
keywords: multi-tier eggless wedding cake Harris Park
Parramatta Granville Merrylands vegetarian wedding cake
